gist.headline: Phicasso joins the gallery
gist.blurb: Phicasso Chat just landed in the community showcase! It's a slick, fully browser-based chat app that keeps your conversations strictly on your device while running on Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added Phicasso Chat, a privacy-focused, browser-native chat application, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Phicasso Chat for secure, local-storage conversations powered by the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: Phicasso Chat implies art (Picasso) + chat. Polly the bee wearing a painter's beret, painting a glowing chat bubble onto a canvas. A chunky retro robot companion watches happily.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a glowing chat bubble onto a wooden canvas easel. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
